recent_news.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
recent_news.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16 years in power is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
recent_news.body_text:
Viktor Orbán's 16 years in power is over, and the system condemned as an "electoral autocracy" lies in tatters, defeated by a 45-year-old former party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to bring it to an end.
"We did it," Péter Magyar told a crowd of cheering supporters in a square beside the River Danube, overlooking Budapest's magnificent parliament on the other side.

recent_news.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory
recent_news.summary: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.
recent_news.body_text:
On the eve of Hungary's bitterly fought and highly significant election, the two main rivals are taking their campaigns to the wire, as Péter Magyar attempts to end 16 years of continuous rule by Viktor Orbán's Fidesz party.
"We're at the gates of a two-thirds majority victory. Let's gear up and push for the last 100m!" he told cheering supporters, before mingling for selfies.

recent_news.title: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
recent_news.summary: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective.
recent_news.body_text:
Some old truths about warfare have been knocking on the door of the Oval Office in the month since US President Donald Trump and Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu sent US and Israeli warplanes to bomb Iran.

general_news.summary: The author is Juan Marsé, this novel is set in 1956, first published in Spain in 1966, and only now appearing in English. Here is the Amazon link.
